subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-10-31 in Akka
subcodes.first_line: How many great ones among the Christians have passed away, yet still doth ring forth the bell of this church; and how sinful were most among them! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چقدر از بزرگان نصاری از میان رفتند ولی هنوز صدای زنگ این کلیسا بلند است و اکثر اینها چقدر شرور بودند
